classical: 左右皆曰： 善。 释之前曰： 使其中有可欲，虽锢南山犹有隙；使其中亡可欲，虽亡石椁，又何戚焉？
modern: 张释之上前说道： 假使它裹面有能够引起贪欲的东西，即使封闭南山作为棺，也还有缝隙；如果裹面没有能够引起贪欲的东西，即使没有石棺，又何必忧虑呢？
source: 汉书·传/张冯汲郑传
english: Zhang Shizhi stepped forward and said: If there is anything inside worth coveting, then even if you sealed up the whole of Mount Nan to serve as a coffin, there would still be gaps; but if there is nothing inside to tempt greed, then even without a stone coffin, what is there to worry about?

classical: 凡教坊司官常服冠带，与百官同；至御前供奉，执粉漆笏，服黑漆幞头，黑绿罗大袖襕袍，黑角偏带，皂靴。
modern: 凡是教坊司官员日常穿的衣服，与各级官员相同；到皇帝跟前侍奉，持着漆成白色的朝板，戴漆成黑色的幞头，穿黑绿色绫罗大袖栏袍，黑色角质材料装饰的偏带，黑色靴。
source: 明史·志/卷四十三
english: All officials of the Jiaofang Bureau wear the same everyday attire as officials of corresponding ranks. When attending upon the emperor, they carry white-lacquered court tablets, wear black-lacquered futou headwear, and are dressed in dark greenish-black silk robes with wide sleeves and horizontal trim, with a side belt adorned with black horn fittings, and black boots.

classical: 皇祐中，颇多灾异，奎极言其徵曰： 今冬令反燠，春候反寒，太阳亏明，五星失度，水旱作沴，饥馑荐臻，此天道之不顺也。自东徂西，地震为患，大河横流，堆阜或出，此地道之不顺也。邪曲害政，阴柔蔽明，群小纷争，众情壅塞，西、北贰敌，求欲无厌，此人事之不和也。
modern: 皇年间，天灾颇多，吴奎分析其症候说 ：今年冬暖春寒，太阳不够明亮，五大行星运行失度，水旱二灾作恶，饥荒接踵而至，这是天道不顺；从东到西，地震为患，黄河改道，地面还冒出山来，这是地道不顺；邪恶势力妨害朝政，阴险小人挡住了皇上的光明，尔虞我诈，明争暗斗，下情难以上达，西夏、辽国二敌，欲壑难填，这是人事不和。
source: 宋史·列传/卷七十五
english: During the reign period, natural disasters were frequent. Wu Kui analyzed the signs and said: This winter was warm and the spring cold; the sun lacked its usual brightness; the five planets moved out of their proper courses; floods and droughts brought havoc; and famines followed one upon another — this is the way of Heaven falling into disorder. From east to west, earthquakes caused suffering; the Yellow River changed its course; and mountains rose up from the ground — this is the way of Earth falling into disorder. Wicked forces obstructed the affairs of court; treacherous men blocked the light of the sovereign; deceit and scheming ran rampant; open strife and covert maneuvering went unchecked; the conditions of the people below could not reach those above; and the two enemies, Western Xia and Liao, were insatiable in their greed — this is the way of human affairs falling into disharmony.

classical: 晚世之时，帝有桀、纣，为琁室、瑶台、象廊、玉床，纣为肉圃、酒池，燎焚天下之财，罢苦万民之力，刳谏者，剔孕妇，攘天下，虐百姓。
modern: 近代的时候，出了桀、纣两个暴君，夏桀修建了琁室、瑶台、象廊、玉床；商纣设置了肉圃、酒池，并耗尽了天下财物，使百姓精疲力尽；纣王还挖出比干的心脏，剖开孕妇的胎腹，正是天下受到骚扰，百姓受到残害。
source: 淮南子·本经训
english: In ancient times, there arose two tyrants, Jie and Zhou. Jie of the Xia dynasty built the Xuan Chamber, the Jade Terrace, the Ivory Corridor, and the Jade Bed. Zhou of the Shang dynasty created forests of meat and pools of wine, squandering all the wealth under heaven and exhausting the people to their limits. Zhou also cut out Bi Gan's heart and split open the wombs of pregnant women. It was a time when the realm was thrown into turmoil and the common people suffered unspeakable cruelty.

classical: 公坐挥三略，遥制六奇，义勇同心，貔貅骋力，雷奔电击，谷静山空，列郡无犬吠之惊，丛祠罢狐鸣之盗。
modern: 陈公身坐帷幕中运用兵法，远远地制定奇略，勇猛的兵民们同心协力，像电闪雷鸣一样迅速打击逆徒，一时间山谷清静，凶徒被扫荡一空，各地再也没有战乱的惊恐，从此免去盗贼的骚扰。
source: 陈书·本纪/卷一
english: Lord Chen, seated within his command tent, deployed his military stratagems and devised brilliant plans from afar. His valiant troops and people united as one, striking down the rebels with the speed of lightning and thunder. In an instant, the mountains and valleys were pacified, the villainous bands swept away entirely. The various regions were freed from the terror of war, and from that time on, the scourge of bandits and thieves was no more.

classical: 秦咸阳宫中有铜人十二枚，坐高皆三五尺。列在一筵上，琴筑竽笙，各有所执。皆组绶华采，俨若生人。
modern: 秦咸阳宫有铜人十二枚，坐着约高三五尺，并排坐在一领大席上，手中各自捧着琴、筑、竽、笙等各种乐器，身上披着华丽的宽大绶带，栩栩如生，跟活人相差无几。
source: 太平广记·卷二百零三·乐一
english: The Qin palace at Xianyang housed twelve bronze figures, each seated about three to five feet tall. They sat side by side on a great mat, each holding a different musical instrument — qin, zhu, yu, sheng, and others — draped in magnificent, flowing sashes, so lifelike they were nearly indistinguishable from living people.

classical: 臣愚以为可密诏主者，使隐核参访郡守，其有老病不隐亲人物，及宰牧少恩，好修人事，烦挠百姓者，皆可征还，为更选代。
modern: 我认为可以密派主事的人，让他们暗中考核察访郡守，那些年老患病不能主事，以及官吏中缺少恩泽，喜欢搞人事关系，烦扰百姓的，都可以征召回京，选派人替代。
source: 晋书·列传/第三章
english: I believe we can secretly dispatch capable officials to covertly evaluate and investigate the commandery governors. Those who are aged or ill and unable to manage affairs, as well as those among the officials who lack benevolence, are given to cultivating personal connections, and cause trouble for the common people, should all be summoned back to the capital and replaced with suitable appointees.

classical: 延寿止车问之，卒曰： 《孝经》曰： 资于事父以事君，而敬同，故母取其爱，而君取其敬，兼之者父也。
modern: 延寿停下车问他，门卒说： 《孝经》说： 以事父之道来事君，其中的敬是相同的，因此事奉母亲取其爱，事奉君主取其敬，敬爱兼取是用来事奉父亲的。
source: 汉书·传/赵尹韩张两王传
english: Yanshou stopped his carriage and asked him. The gate guard said: The Classic of Filial Piety states: The reverence one shows in serving one's father is the same reverence applied to serving one's ruler. Thus, in serving one's mother, one draws on love; in serving one's ruler, one draws on reverence; and both love and reverence together are what one brings to serving one's father.

classical: 故不高官室者，非爱木也；不大钟鼎者，非爱金也。直行性命之情，而制度可以为万民仪。
modern: 所以不修建高大宫室，原因不是爱惜木材；不铸造大型钟鼎，原因不是珍惜铜铁等金属，只不过是遵循天性命运的真情来做事而已，这样的制度就可以成为万民的榜样。
source: 淮南子·泰族训
english: So the reason for not building tall and grand palaces is not out of concern for timber; the reason for not casting large bells and cauldrons is not out of regard for bronze and iron — it is simply a matter of acting in accordance with the true nature of one's heavenly-ordained destiny. Such a way of governance can then serve as a model for all people.

classical: 己卯，诏太社内先收掌唐朝罪人首级等，宜令骨肉或先旧僚属收葬，其丧葬仪注不得过制。
modern: 二十八日，颁令天下，大土地神庙里原先收藏掌管的后唐罪人头颅等，应让他们的子孙后代或者原先的旧官员收殓埋葬，他们的丧葬礼节制度不能超过规定。
source: 旧五代史·后晋/高祖纪二
english: On the twenty-eighth day, an edict was issued throughout the realm, ordering that the skulls of criminals from the Later Tang dynasty, which had been stored and kept in the great earth-god temples, should be collected and buried by their descendants or former officials. The funeral rites and ceremonies were not to exceed the prescribed regulations.

classical: 今中官邪孽，比肩裂土，皆竞立胤嗣，继体传爵，或乞子疏属，或买兒市道，殆乖开国承家之义。
modern: 现在宦官邪孽，纷纷裂土封侯，还争着立后代，继承爵位，有的求子于疏远的亲属，有的就在街上买儿子，这是违背开国承家的原则的。
source: 后汉书·列传/杜栾刘李刘谢列传
english: The eunuchs, those wicked parasites, are now carving up land and receiving noble titles one after another, competing to establish heirs and pass on their ranks — some seeking sons among distant relatives, others simply buying children off the street. This runs contrary to the founding principles of establishing a family line and inheriting a noble house.

classical: 忠厚直显谟阁，台谏、给舍交章论列，后闻，即令易武，命学士院降诏，戒敕忠厚等不得预闻朝政、通贵近、至私第谒见宰执。
modern: 孟忠厚在显谟阁当差，台谏、给舍连连上奏论其过，太后听见后，就命令易武，让学士院降诏，戒令忠厚等不得参预朝政，勿通贵近、到私宅谒见宰相。
source: 宋史·列传/卷二
english: Meng Zhonghou was serving at the Xianmo Pavilion when censors and remonstrance officials submitted a series of memorials criticizing his conduct. Upon hearing of this, the Empress Dowager ordered his transfer and had the Hanlin Academy issue a decree admonishing Zhonghou and others not to interfere in court affairs, not to associate with those close to power, and not to call on chief ministers at their private residences.

classical: 宁时有三百兵，乃曰： 可复以五百人益吾，吾往对之，保羽闻吾欬唾，不敢涉水，涉水即是吾禽。 肃便选千兵益宁，宁乃夜往。
modern: 甘宁当时有兵三百人，就说： 能否再给我增添五百人，我前去对付他，保证关羽一听到我咳唾之声，就不敢渡河，如他渡河就被我擒获。 鲁肃便择选一千人增添甘宁部队，甘宁就连夜赶往资水上游。
source: 三国志·吴书/程黄韩蒋周陈董甘淩徐
english: At the time, Gan Ning had three hundred troops under his command, and said: "If you can give me five hundred more men, I will go and deal with him. I guarantee that the moment Guan Yu hears so much as a cough from me, he will not dare cross the river — and if he does cross, I will capture him." Lu Su then selected a thousand men to reinforce Gan Ning's force, and Gan Ning set out that very night for the upper reaches of the Zi River.

classical: 其桥高二丈，桥下水西北自演武场来，初涸不成流，至是倏而凌岸，倏而逾梁，人人有产蛙沉灶之虑。
modern: 此桥高二丈，桥下水从西北方自演武场流来，起初干涸不成流，到这里倏地越过江岸，倏地漫过了桥，人人都有炉灶沉入水底生出青蛙的忧虑。
source: 徐霞客游记·粤西游日记十七
english: The bridge stands two zhang high; the water beneath flows from the northwest, coming from the direction of the drill grounds. At first it runs dry, barely a trickle, but here it suddenly surges over the riverbank and rushes across the bridge, and everyone fears that their hearths and stoves will sink beneath the water and breed frogs.

classical: 领军民千户所一：曰大田。领宣抚司三：日施南，曰散毛，曰忠建。领安抚司八：曰东乡五路，曰忠路，曰忠孝，曰金峒，曰龙潭，曰大旺，曰忠峒，曰高罗。领长官司七：曰摇把峒，曰上爱茶峒，曰下爱茶峒，曰剑南，曰木册，曰镇南，曰唐崖。领蛮夷长官司五：曰镇远，曰隆奉，曰西泙，曰东流，曰腊壁峒。
modern: 施州卫军民指挥使司统领一个军民千户所，即大田；统领三个宣抚司，分别是施南、散毛、忠建；统领八个安抚司，分别是东乡五路、忠路、忠孝、金峒、龙潭、大旺、忠峒、高罗；统领七个长官司，分别称为摇把峒、上爱茶峒、下爱茶峒、剑南、木册、镇南、唐崖；统领五个蛮夷长官司，分别是镇远、隆奉、西评、东流、腊壁峒。
source: 明史·列传/卷一百九十八
english: The Shizhou Guard Military and Civilian Command oversaw one military-civilian thousand-household office, namely Datian; three pacification commissions, namely Shinan, Sanmao, and Zhongjian; eight appeasement commissions, namely Dongxiang Wulu, Zhonglu, Zhongxiao, Jindong, Longtan, Dawang, Zhongdong, and Gaoluo; seven headman offices, known respectively as Yaobadong, Shang'aichadong, Xia'aichadong, Jiannan, Muce, Zhennan, and Tangya; and five barbarian headman offices, namely Zhenyuan, Longfeng, Xiping, Dongliu, and Labidong.

classical: 曰： 臣闻德以旌贤，爵以建事， 明试以功 《典谟》所美， 五服五章 ，天秩所作，是以臣竭其忠，君丰其宠，举不失德，下忘其死。
modern: 奏道： 臣听说德以明贤，爵以建事 ，明试以功 ，《典谟》所赞美 ，五服五章 ，天秩所作，因此臣竭其忠心，君厚其宠，举动不失德，下忘其死。
source: 后汉书·列传/邓张徐张胡列传
english: He memorialized: Your servant has heard that virtue illuminates the worthy, and rank is established through achievement; that merit is proven through clear testing — a principle praised in the Canon and Counsels — and that the five grades of rank and five distinctions of insignia are the order Heaven itself has ordained. Thus does a servant exhaust his loyalty, and a ruler deepen his favor; conduct never departs from virtue, and those below forget even the fear of death.

classical: 刘毅等不欲刘裕入辅政，议以中领军谢混为扬州刺史，或欲令裕于丹徒领扬州，以内事付孟昶。
modern: 刘毅等人不希望刘裕进入朝中辅佐政事，因而商议任命中领军谢混为扬州刺史，也有人打算让刘裕在丹徒兼管扬州，而把朝中的政务交给孟昶管理。
source: 资治通鉴·晋纪/晋纪三十六
english: Liu Yi and others did not want Liu Yu to enter the court and assist in state affairs, so they deliberated over appointing Zhongling Commander Xie Hun as Governor of Yangzhou. Some also proposed letting Liu Yu concurrently oversee Yangzhou from Dantu, while entrusting the administration of court affairs to Meng Chu.

classical: 八年春，真除益都军千户，赐号拔都儿。与宋兵战襄阳城下，追奔逐北，直抵城门，流矢中左股而止。
modern: 宋襄阳守将吕文焕以一万五千兵来攻万山堡，万户张弘范正与宋军交战，庭单骑杀入敌阵，虽身受创，亦奋力战斗，打败宋军。八年春，任为益都新军千户，赐号 拔都儿 ，与宋军战于襄阳城下，一直打到北门，左股中箭而止。
source: 元史·列传/卷四十九
english: Lü Wenhua, the Song commander defending Xiangyang, led fifteen thousand troops to attack Wanshan Fort. While Myriad Commander Zhang Hongfan was engaged in battle with the Song forces, Ting charged alone into the enemy ranks on horseback. Though wounded, he fought on with full force and defeated the Song army. In the spring of the eighth year, he was appointed Minghu of the new army at Yidu and granted the title Batur. He fought the Song forces beneath the walls of Xiangyang, pressing the attack all the way to the north gate, where he was stopped by an arrow wound to his left thigh.

classical: 向者张绛初杀行泰，召仲武，欲以留务让之，牙中一二百人不可。仲武行至昌平，绛复却之。
modern: 过去，张绛刚刚诛杀陈行泰时，曾派人召张仲武到幽州，打算把留后让给他。后来，亲兵中有一二百人不同意，于是，张仲武走到昌平县时，张绛又命他返回。
source: 资治通鉴·唐纪/唐纪六十二
english: In the past, shortly after Zhang Jiang had executed Chen Xingtai, he sent someone to summon Zhang Zhongwu to Youzhou, intending to hand over the position of acting military governor to him. Later, a hundred or two hundred of his personal troops objected, and so when Zhang Zhongwu had traveled as far as Changping County, Zhang Jiang ordered him to turn back.

classical: 初，安宁城有五盐井，人得煮鬻自给。玄宗诏特进何履光以兵定南诏境，取安宁城及井，复立马援铜柱，乃还。
modern: 当初，安宁城有五口盐井，人们可以煮盐出售为生，玄宗诏令特进何履光用兵控制南诏，夺取安宁城及盐井，又在马援竖立铜柱作为界记后回朝。
source: 新唐书·列传/卷一百四十七
english: In earlier times, Anning city had five salt wells, and the people could boil salt and sell it to make a living. Emperor Xuanzong issued an imperial decree ordering the specially-appointed official He Lüguang to lead troops to take control of Nanzhao, seize Anning city and its salt wells, and then, after erecting a bronze pillar at the site where Ma Yuan had once set up his boundary marker, return to the capital.

classical: 于是除《高絙》、《紫鹿》、《跂行》、《鳖食》及《齐王卷衣》、《笮兒》等乐。又减其禀。其后复《高絙》、《紫鹿》焉。
modern: 皇上于是废除《高短》、《紫鹿》、《跛行》、《鳌食》及《齐王卷衣》、《笮儿》等乐，又减少发给乐人的廪食以后又恢复了《高短》、《紫鹿》二乐。
source: 宋书·志/卷十九
english: The Emperor thereupon abolished the musical pieces "Tall and Short," "Purple Deer," "Limping Gait," "Turtle Feeding," "The King of Qi's Robe," and "The Rope Walker," and also reduced the rations allotted to the musicians. Later, however, he restored the two pieces "Tall and Short" and "Purple Deer."

classical: 若驻跸江上，号召上流之兵，顺流而下，以助声势，金鼓旌旗，千里相望，则敌人虽众，不敢南渡。
modern: 如果陛下停驻在长江边上，号令上游的军队，顺流而下，增加声势，使千里之间，旌旗相望，战鼓之声相闻，则敌人虽然多，也不敢南渡长江。
source: 宋史·列传/卷一百一十八
english: If Your Majesty were to station yourself along the Yangtze River, commanding the armies upstream to advance with the current, swelling your forces and momentum, so that banners and flags stretch across a thousand li in an unbroken line and the thunder of war drums carries from one end to the other, then the enemy, however numerous, would not dare cross south over the river.

classical: 甲戌，元帅左都监承裔遣其部将纳兰记僧等，合葩俄族都管尼旁古，以兵掩袭瓜黎余族诸蕃帐，屡破之，斩馘士卒，禽其首领，俘获人畜甚多，是日捷至。
modern: 二十九日，元帅左都监承裔派其部将纳兰记僧等，联合葩俄族都管尼庞古，带兵突然袭击瓜黎余族各个蕃帐，屡次打败他们，割下士兵的耳朵，擒其首领，俘获很多人畜，当日捷报就到。
source: 金史·本纪/卷十五
english: On the twenty-ninth day, the Marshal's Left Superintendent Chengyì dispatched his subordinate commanders Nalan Jiseng and others, joining forces with Pá'é tribal administrator Nipanggǔ, to launch a surprise attack with troops against the various tribal camps of the Guālí remnant clan. They defeated them repeatedly, cut off the ears of enemy soldiers, captured their chieftains, and took many people and livestock as prisoners. A report of victory arrived that same day.

classical: 愿以赐臣，臣得困辱之，使自悔悟迁善，为他日用，杀之无益也。 帝意解，召六人谓之曰： 生汝者速哥也，其竭力事之。
modern: 请求交他处理。太宗明白他的用意，批准了。速哥将此六人带至云中全部释放。速哥享年六十二岁而卒，赠推忠翊运同德功臣、太师、开府仪同三司、上柱国，追封宣宁王，谥 忠襄 。忙哥撒儿，姓察哈札剌儿氏。曾祖名赤老温恺赤，祖名搠阿，父那海，均侍奉烈祖。
source: 元史·列传/卷十一
english: He requested that the matter be handed over to him for handling. Taizong understood his intention and approved. Suge took the six men to Yunzhong and released them all. Suge died at the age of sixty-two and was posthumously granted the titles of Tuizhong Yiyun Tongde Meritorious Official, Grand Preceptor, Kaifu Yitong Sansi, and Superior Pillar of the State, with the posthumous noble title of Prince of Xuanning and the posthumous honorific Zhongxiang. Mangghasar was of the Chahajalaer clan. His great-grandfather was named Chilaowenkaichi, his grandfather was named Shuoa, and his father was Nahai; all of them had served under the Illustrious Ancestor.

classical: 置黄道半弧弦一度，以半径乘之，得六十零度八七五为实，以赤道小股五十六度零二八一为法除之，得一度零八分六十五秒，为赤道半弧弦。
modern: 将赤道半弧弦一度，乘以天圆半径，即赤道大弦。得六十度八七五作为被除数，以赤道小弦五十六度零二八一作为除敷相除，得一度零八分六十五秒，就是赤道的半弧弦。
source: 明史·志/卷八
english: Multiply the half-arc chord of one degree on the equator by the radius of the celestial circle to obtain the great chord of the equator. Taking 60.875 as the dividend and dividing by the small chord of the equator, 56.0281, as the divisor, the result is 1 degree 8 minutes 65 seconds, which is the half-arc chord of the equator.

classical: 时太后可足浑氏颇预外事，根欲为乱，乃言于恪曰： 今主上幼冲，母后干政，殿下宜防意外之变，思有以自全。
modern: 当时太后可足浑氏经常干预朝政，慕舆根想要作乱，就对慕容恪进言说： 如今主上年幼，母后干预政事，殿下应该防范意外的变故，考虑用来自我保全的方法。
source: 资治通鉴·晋纪/晋纪二十三
english: At that time, Empress Dowager Kezu Hun frequently interfered in court affairs. Muyu Gen, harboring ambitions of rebellion, spoke to Murong Ke, saying: "The emperor is young, and the empress dowager meddles in state affairs. Your Highness should guard against unforeseen changes and consider ways to protect yourself."

classical: 今硕德如王恕，忠鲠如强珍，亮直刚方如章懋、林俊、张吉，皆一时人望，不宜贬锢，负上天生才之意。
modern: 现在具有大德的如王恕，忠诚耿直的如强珍，耿直、严正的如章懋、林俊、张吉，他们都是现今众人所仰望的人才，不应该贬斥禁锢，有负于上天创造人才的本意。
source: 明史·列传/卷六十七
english: Those who possess great virtue, like Wang Shu; those who are loyal and upright, like Qiang Zhen; those who are principled and stern, like Zhang Mao, Lin Jun, and Zhang Ji — all of these are men whom the people of today look up to and admire. They should not be demoted, censured, or confined, lest we betray Heaven's intent in bringing forth such talent.

classical: 于是怀光左右发怒喧噪。宣诏未毕，众杀巢父及中使啖守盈，怀光亦不之止，复治兵为拒守之备。
modern: 于是，李怀光的亲信生气地喧闹起来，诏书还没有宣读完毕，众人便杀死了孔巢父以及中使啖守盈。李怀光对此也不加制止，再次整治兵马，作抵御防守的准备。
source: 资治通鉴·唐纪/唐纪四十七
english: Li Huaiguang's trusted followers flew into an angry uproar, and before the imperial edict had even been fully read aloud, the crowd killed Kong Chaofu and the palace envoy Dan Shouying. Li Huaiguang made no move to stop them, and once again set about organizing his troops in preparation for defense.

classical: 吾始闻忧，欲以辞免。然不觉与使者俱出郡城，仅行五十里，至冥司。其官即故相吕公也。
modern: 我开始听说很发愁，想要用推辞获免，然而不知不觉地和使者一起出了郡城，走了将近五十里，到了冥司，那里的官就是已故的相国吕公。
source: 太平广记·卷四十三·神仙四十三
english: When I first heard about it, I was filled with worry and wanted to make excuses to get out of it, yet before I knew it I had left the prefectural city together with the messenger, traveled nearly fifty li, and arrived at the underworld court, where the presiding official turned out to be the late Chancellor Lü Gong.

classical: 独杨损尚书三十来年，两为给事，再任京尹，防御三峰，青州节度使，年逾耳顺，官历藩垣。
modern: 只有尚书杨损，三十年来，两次任门下省的给事中，两次任京兆尹，防守华州，任青州节度使，年过六十了，还多次担任守国卫疆的重要官职。
source: 太平广记·卷二百二十三·相三
english: Only Shangshu Yang Sun, over the course of thirty years, had twice served as Jishizhong in the Menxia Secretariat, twice as Prefect of Jingzhao, defended Huazhou, served as Military Governor of Qingzhou, and even past the age of sixty continued to hold important posts guarding the realm and defending the frontiers.
